name: Tri-Edge Levia
name_jp: トライエッジ・リヴァイア
desc:
3 Level 3 monsters
Banish any monster destroyed by battle with this card. Once per turn, during either player's turn: You can detach 1 Xyz Material from this card, then target 1 face-up monster on the field; it loses 800 ATK, also its effects are negated. These changes last until the end of this turn.
mnst_eff:
3 Level 3 monsters
Banish any monster destroyed by battle with this card. Once per turn, during either player's turn: You can detach 1 Xyz Material from this card, then target 1 face-up monster on the field; it loses 800 ATK, also its effects are negated. These changes last until the end of this turn.
eff:
3 Level 3 monsters
Banish any monster destroyed by battle with this card. Once per turn, during either player's turn: You can detach 1 Xyz Material from this card, then target 1 face-up monster on the field; it loses 800 ATK, also its effects are negated. These changes last until the end of this turn.

mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
